title: SummaryCommand
description: Report produced by `command-summarizer` for a single `command` node. Extends `report-base.schema.json`. Stability: experimental.

whatItDoes.description: One-sentence summary of the command's effect. REQUIRED.

invocationExample.description: Canonical example invocation, including arguments. Opaque platform-formatted string.

argsObserved.description: Argument structure as inferred from the body. MAY differ from declared `frontmatter.args`; rules can emit drift issues.
